title: HR Executive
description:
HR Executive (Recruitment ) - Tampines - US MNC Semiconduct

Responsibilities:

  • Manage the full recruitment cycle from sourcing to onboarding.
  • Plan and run hiring strategies via job portals, agencies, and career events.
  • Set recruitment targets and timelines to meet hiring needs and business priorities.
  • Screen, interview, and shortlist candidates.
  • Conduct reference checks.
  • Act as the main contact for recruitment agencies.
  • Coordinate interviews and support hiring teams when needed.
  • Prepare weekly recruitment reports.
  • Ensure compliance with regulations.
  • Conduct exit interviews and share retention insights.
  • Monitor labor market trends and relevant government regulations.
  • Support the review and update of HR policies and procedures.
  • Advise employees and managers on talent and workforce matters.

Requirements:

  • At least Diploma in Human Resources, Business Administration, Engineering, or related field.
  • Minimum 2 years of end-to-end recruitment experience, preferably in semiconductor or manufacturing industry.
  • Ability to manage high-volume hiring efficiently.
  • Strong knowledge of Singapore employment laws, interview techniques, and candidate screening methods.
  • Proficient in Excel (VLOOKUP, Pivot), Outlook, and database management; SAP experience is a plus.
  • Excellent communication skills (oral and written) and strong time/project management abilities.
  • Flexible, detail-oriented, and passionate about HR, with a positive and open-minded attitude.
  • Experience in non-executive hiring is an advantage.
  • Mass hiring experience in fast pace environment.
  • Experience in hire direct and indirect labour.
  • Must have HR knowledge familiar with labour law.
  • Good to have SAP knowledge.

For interested applicants, kindly send your resume in Word/PDF format to include the following in your resume including:

1. Current Salary

2. Expected Salary

3. Availability

4. Reason for leaving

Thank you for your application and we regret that only shortlisted applicants will be notified

By submitting any application or resume to us, you will be deemed to have agreed & consented to us collecting, using, retaining & disclosing your personal information to prospective employers with the services provided by us.

Nguyen Thi Doan | R23116355

RRecruiter Pte. Ltd. | 18C9514

postedCompany.description:
RRecruiter is an international recruitment agency specialized in headhunting for executives, managers and experts. We serve as a strategic partner to our clients, offering a turnkey solution to capture and deliver the top talent needed to complete successful projects by aligning with the unique needs of our clients. Our timely action plan significantly saves client’s time and costs.

Our passion is to deliver outstanding customer service to the companies and candidates that we partner. Developing long term and mutually beneficial relationships is the key to our success.

  • Recruitment Experts in Singapore, Thailand, Vietnam, Philippines & Indonesia market
  • Dedicated Key Account Personnel to handle client relationship
  • Unique database of candidates
  • Access to leading job boards and CV database
  • Extensive experience in sourcing and selecting for key position

More information: https://rrecruiterint.com/
